note: Shipped 2026-07-12: the gogo terminal cockpit (cli/internal/tui/) restyled to the Claude-Design 1b + 1c mockup — header attention summary, status pills, phase dots ①②③④⑤, heavy ┃ gate stripes, collapsed changelog, contextual footer, and a needs-you inbox strip with 1..9 number-key gate answering — over the same contract.Repo (no contract or pipeline-state change). Both the FR-4 dots and the FR-9 segmented bar render one shared phaseProgress(f) [5]phaseState vector. before/cockpit-redesign-flow.mmd is the plan-time as-is baseline for the flow diagram.
